items.summary_zh: 刚完成510亿巨额融资，DeepSeek开启疯狂招人模式 潮新闻
items.summary_en: DeepSeek, after raising $51 billion, launched an aggressive hiring campaign to expand its workforce. The AI startup's rapid growth follows its recent funding and technological breakthroughs.
items.why_zh: DeepSeek的巨额融资和疯狂招聘表明AI初创企业正加速扩张，竞争白热化。
items.why_en: DeepSeek's massive funding and hiring spree highlight the intense competition and rapid expansion in the AI startup space.

items.title_zh: 历经13年，二手车交易平台大搜车终于登陆纳斯达克
items.title_en: After 13 Years, Used Car Trading Platform Dasouche Lists on Nasdaq
items.summary_zh: 北京时间 2026 年 6 月 25 日， DSC Holdings Ltd.（以下简称"大搜车"或"公司"，纳斯达克代码： "DSC" ）正式在美国纳斯达克全球市场挂牌交易，成为 2026 年首家赴美上市的中国企业 。公司本次发行 3,000,000 份美国存托股份（ADS） ， 发行价定为每股 ADS 17.00 美元 ， 总发行规模约 5,100 万美元 （未计超额配售权）。公司另授予承销商 30 天的超额配售权，可按发行价额外购买最多 450,000 份 ADS 。 大搜车在纳斯达克挂牌上市 大搜车创始人兼CEO姚军红在上市仪式上表示：“大搜车的发展历程是一个为他人解决问题、创造价值的故事。二手车流通是一个非常复杂的行业，参与者众多，且存在许多线下环节。大搜车用数字化和AI智能去改善二手车商的工作流，去消除行业内的交易摩擦，通过为别人创造价值而实现自我价值。大搜车坚持13年的战略没有改变过，也将一直坚持——推动中国二手车行业的数字化和智能化。” 本次大搜车发行的联席主承销商代表为 德意志银行（Deutsche Bank）、中金公司（CICC）以及 CR Global Markets 。公司美国法律顾问为 Davis Polk & Wardwell； 公司中国法律顾问为 海问律师事务所（Haiwen & Partners） 。承销商美国法律顾问为 Cleary Gottlie…
items.summary_en: On June 25, 2026, Dasouche (DSC Holdings Ltd.) listed on Nasdaq, becoming the first Chinese company to go public in the US in 2026. The company issued 3 million ADS at $17 each, raising about $51 million. Founder Yao Junhong emphasized the company's commitment to digitalizing and intelligently transforming the used car industry.
items.why_zh: 大搜车上市标志着中国二手车行业数字化和智能化进程的重要里程碑。
items.why_en: Dasouche's listing marks a significant milestone in the digitalization and intelligent transformation of China's used car industry.

items.title_zh: Anthropic进一步抢占OpenAI市场份额：付费收入和用户持续增长
items.title_en: Anthropic Gains on OpenAI: Paid Revenue and Users Continue to Grow
items.summary_zh: 美国顶尖人工智能企业OpenAI与Anthropic之间的竞争日益激烈。据一份报告称，Anthropic正在快速抢占OpenAI的付费用户市场份额。信用卡交易分析公司Indagari数据显示，Anthropic旗舰模型Claude付费用户和收入逐月增长，自2026年1月以来，该细分市场的收入增长了约75%。Indagari的数据来自2800万美国消费者的数千亿笔匿名信用卡交易记录，覆盖了2025年至2026年5月10日之间的每周交易。另一个AI在线教育平台DataCamp也给出了类似的结论。其指出，平台上的用户今年对Claude的兴趣呈爆炸式增长，Claude已经成为该网站上搜索量最高的词条，甚至超过了AI。（新浪财经）
items.summary_en: Anthropic is rapidly gaining market share from OpenAI, with Claude's paid users and revenue growing about 75% since January 2026, according to credit card transaction data. AI education platform DataCamp also reports Claude as its most searched term, surpassing 'AI'.
items.why_zh: Anthropic的快速增长表明AI市场竞争加剧，OpenAI面临严峻挑战。
items.why_en: Anthropic's rapid growth indicates intensifying competition in the AI market, posing a serious challenge to OpenAI.

items.title_zh: Patronus AI获得5000万美元B轮融资
items.title_en: Patronus AI Raises $50M Series B
items.summary_zh: Patronus AI成功完成5000万美元的B轮融资。该公司专注于AI安全与评估领域，提供模型测试和监控解决方案。此轮融资将用于扩大团队、加速产品开发，并拓展市场。具体投资方和估值尚未披露。
items.summary_en: Patronus AI Raises $50M Series B The SaaS News
items.why_zh: Patronus AI的融资凸显了AI安全与评估领域日益增长的重要性。
items.why_en: Patronus AI's funding highlights the growing importance of AI safety and evaluation.

items.title_zh: DeepSeek全线扩军
items.title_en: DeepSeek Expands Across the Board
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek全线扩军 搜狐网
items.summary_en: DeepSeek is expanding across the board, including team size, business scope, and product lines. The move signals its ambition to strengthen competitiveness in the AI field.
items.why_zh: DeepSeek的全面扩张表明其积极布局AI市场，意图提升竞争力。
items.why_en: DeepSeek's expansion indicates its active efforts to strengthen its position in the AI market.

items.title_zh: 国产大模型Kimi表态：最高优先是研发 要跟美国御三家AI掰掰手腕
items.title_en: Chinese AI Model Kimi Says R&D Top Priority, Aims to Compete with US AI Giants
items.summary_zh: 国产大模型Kimi表态：最高优先是研发 要跟美国御三家AI掰掰手腕 凤凰网
items.summary_en: Chinese AI model Kimi stated that R&D is its top priority and aims to compete with top US AI companies. Kimi plans to increase R&D investment to enhance model performance and gain a foothold in the global AI market.
items.why_zh: Kimi的表态显示中国AI企业正积极挑战美国领先地位，加剧全球AI竞争。
items.why_en: Kimi's statement shows Chinese AI companies are actively challenging US leadership, intensifying global AI competition.

items.title_zh: 特斯拉车机迎来“智慧大脑”：豆包大模型全面接入，交互体验升级
items.title_en: Tesla Gets 'Smart Brain': Doubao Large Model Fully Integrated, Upgrading Interaction
items.summary_zh: 特斯拉车机迎来“智慧大脑”：豆包大模型全面接入，交互体验升级 新浪网
items.summary_en: Tesla's in-car system has fully integrated the Doubao large model, upgrading interaction experience. The model enables smarter voice assistant, navigation, and entertainment, enhancing the driving experience. This marks a deep application of AI models in the automotive sector.
items.why_zh: 豆包大模型接入特斯拉车机，展示了AI大模型在智能汽车领域的巨大潜力。
items.why_en: The integration of Doubao into Tesla's system demonstrates the huge potential of AI large models in smart vehicles.
